tools.name: send_notification
tools.description: Send an immediate notification. Fires instantly with no delay capability. For one-time future alerts, use schedule_create with fire_at. For recurring alerts, use schedule_create with expression (cron/RRULE). The router decides channels/copy from preferences and urgency hints. Include a confidence score (0-1).

message.description: Notification message the user should receive

requires_action.description: Whether the notification expects user action (default: true)

is_async_background.description: Whether the event is asynchronous/background work (default: false)

visible_in_source_now.description: Set true when user is already viewing the source context (default: false)

deadline_at.description: Optional deadline timestamp in epoch milliseconds

preferred_channels.description: Optional routing hints for preferred channels (not deterministic)

conversation_id.description: Optional source conversation ID for notification context

source_event_name.description: Optional event name for audit and dedupe grouping (default: "user.send_notification")

deep_link_metadata.description: Optional metadata clients can use for deep linking

dedupe_key.description: Optional dedupe key to suppress duplicate notifications

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called
